subject: Welcome aboard — you're now an OpenMentor mentor
html:
Hi {{first_name}},

Great news — your mentor application has been approved! Your profile is now live in the OpenMentor catalog:

{{mentor_profile_url}}

Everything happens in your mentor dashboard: new mentorship requests land there, and that's where you update their status, manage your sessions, and edit your profile. To sign in, just request a magic link with the email address you registered with — no password needed.

Log in to your dashboard

A few tips to get the most out of OpenMentor:

  • Reply to new requests quickly — mentees really appreciate it.
  • Keep request statuses up to date so mentees know what to expect.
  • Keep your profile fresh: a clear description and a fair price bring more requests.

If you have any questions, just reply to this email — we're happy to help.

Happy mentoring!
The OpenMentor Team

This is an automated message from OpenMentor

https://openmentor.io
text:
Hi {{first_name}},

Great news — your mentor application has been approved! Your profile is now live in the OpenMentor catalog:

{{mentor_profile_url}}

Everything happens in your mentor dashboard: new mentorship requests land there, and that's where you update their status, manage your sessions, and edit your profile. To sign in, just request a magic link with the email address you registered with — no password needed.

Log in to your dashboard: https://openmentor.io/mentor/login

A few tips to get the most out of OpenMentor:
- Reply to new requests quickly — mentees really appreciate it.
- Keep request statuses up to date so mentees know what to expect.
- Keep your profile fresh: a clear description and a fair price bring more requests.

If you have any questions, just reply to this email — we're happy to help.

Happy mentoring!
The OpenMentor Team
